/INTC/CAL:ACM ELIG RPT/ACM/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO ENTER AND COMPLETE RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT AT TRP ACADEMY/CTORD:DEFENDANT NOT TO POSSESS ANY WEAPONS, DRUGS WITHOUT A LAWFUL PRESCRIPTION, AND NOT TO CONSUME ALCOHOL/DEF:ADMONISHED TO ABIDE BY THE PREVIOUSLY FILED STAY AWAY ORDER,/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND HOME DETENTION AND IS ORDERED TOCOMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD ANDBY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:FURTHER PRETRIAL & ACM PROG RPT/DOPU:ACM/
